event: Scala dei Giganti — Doge's Palace Venice
description: A dramatic view through a dark arch into a sunlit Renaissance courtyard showing an ornate marble staircase flanked by elaborately carved walls and arches. The staircase rises in two flights to an upper gallery with multiple levels of arcaded facades. Small figures ascend the stairs. The architecture is richly decorated with columns, sculptures, and gilded details. The contrast between the dark foreground arch and the brilliantly lit courtyard creates a theatrical framing effect.
